title: Mace Enchant Indicator - Breach and Density
description: Changes Mace colour based on Breach and Density. Now with Wind Burst.
body:
Mace Enchant Indicator is a simple texture pack that changes the colour of the mace depending on its enchantment all in vanilla Minecraft, with no mods required. ---

***

--- ## Features - Red mace for **Density** - Blue mace for **Breach** --- ## Why Mace Enchant Indicator? Humans notice colour faster than shape. This pack uses that to make enchantments instantly recognizable, so you can tell which mace you’re holding without checking manually. --- ## Overview ### Screenshots | Breach | Density | |--------|---------| | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bc614e11d32eb3ef7324b9a7ff373cd94fbfea9.png) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cac68497677b3314c45aac749c061c5c42162274.png) | #### Wind Burst Addition | Breach + Windburst | Density + Windburst | Regular + Windburst | |--------|---------|-----------| | | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71aad69df338db6e8847ae8977aab819d7a2f953.png) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399b4d828feefa30833ddff1b51afbb82bd60d9d.png) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1e2c535dcc6cc01a8538258ed44a3d09a92dd85.png) | ### Enchantments | Breach | Density | |--------|---------| | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6403a3a41a3de4df8f3018c602f3e05a1b858f03.png) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8803428a05e7e4c6f33d09967d8024ee229962ca.png) | #### Wind Burst Addition | Breach + Windburst | Density + Windburst | Regular + Windburst | |--------|---------|-----------| | | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a651b69da3237281b939f278f201584f3d8b05.png) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb384d032871ab974c63c058f043c81ba72c0c33.png) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2298e9e4f821fcfa0bef86b767c1a20d3583462.png) | --- ## Technical ### Requirements | Pack Version | Minecraft Version | Forge | Fabric | Vanilla | |--------------|------------------|--------|--------|---------| | 1.x | 1.21-Snapshot 26.2+ | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | | 2.0 | 1.21-Snapshot 26.2+ | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | --- ### Installation 1. Download the ZIP file 2. Place it in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder 3. Enable it from the Resource Pack menu --- ### Compatibility - Works with all vanilla-based gameplay - Not compatible with texture packs that change the shape of the mace (3D maces, short maces, etc.) - Resource pack only, no mods required --- ### Tags mace indicator, breach density, breach mace, density mace, mace enchant, pvp mace, breach density indicator, mace pvp, enchantment indicator, vanilla mace, mace breach, mace density, breach indicator, density indicator, pvp indicator, mace enchantments, pvp utility, vanilla pvp, mace visibility, enchant visibility --- ### Contact For any concerns regarding Mace Enchant Indicator, contact me at: precisionzero.creator@gmail.com --- ### License All Rights Reserved
